summary: Expense tracker app with UI improvements: white background, blue color scheme, rounded cards (radius 12), bold amount text, small grey date text, and clean spacing.

existing_features.title: Apply a white background (#FFFFFF) as the global app background across all screens, replacing any existing dark or coloured backgrounds.

Use a cohesive blue colour scheme for primary actions, accents, navigation highlights, buttons, progress bars, and chart colours. Use a single primary blue (e.g. #2563EB) and a lighter blue tint (e.g. #EFF6FF) for card headers or highlighted areas.

Restyle all cards (TotalsCards, CategoryBreakdown, ExpenseList items, DashboardScreen chart containers) with a border-radius of 12px, a white card background, a subtle light grey or blue-tinted border, and a soft box shadow for depth.
Display expense amount values in bold font weight (font-bold or font-semibold) across ExpenseList items, TotalsCards, and the Calculator session list so amounts are visually prominent.

Render date values in a small font size (text-xs or text-sm) and grey colour (e.g. #9CA3AF) across ExpenseList items, CalculatorSessionList, and any other places dates appear, so they are secondary to the amount and description.

Improve spacing throughout the app: increase padding inside cards (at least 16px), add consistent vertical gaps between list items and cards (at least 12px), and ensure section headings have adequate top/bottom margin. Remove any cramped or inconsistent spacing inherited from the previous theme.

Update the global CSS variables and Tailwind theme tokens in frontend/src/index.css and frontend/tailwind.config.js to reflect the new white background, blue primary, grey text, and 12px border-radius as defaults so the design is consistent across light mode.

new_feature_requests.summary: Improve UI of expense tracker: white background, blue color, rounded cards (radius 12), bold amount text, small grey date, clean spacing
